title: Respectable
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Respectable''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that was a part of the blockade of [[ThonBoka]]. It functioned as a picket cruiser, challenging [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] when he arrived at the blockade. Lando was brought aboard the vessel. He posed as a traveling salesman and gained the trust of a security chief onboard, who gave him contacts on other ships on the blockade he could sell his wares to.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
